settings.heading:
Goods for the household,
and the ones in it.
settings.body: Considered linens, ceramics, and leather for cats, dogs, and the people who live with them. Made to be left out, not put away.

settings.title: Free U.S. Shipping
settings.body: On orders over $75. Ships from Brooklyn in 2 business days.

settings.title: Vet-Reviewed
settings.body: Foods and supplements formulated with practicing veterinarians.

settings.title: Heirloom Materials
settings.body: OEKO-TEX® linen, food-grade ceramic, vegetable-tanned leather.

settings.title: 60-Day Returns
settings.body: Wash it, sleep on it, walk on it. Return it within 60 days.

settings.heading: The quiet ones.
settings.body: Beds, towers, and toys made of felted wool, organic cotton, and untreated woods.

settings.heading: The companions.
settings.body: Vegetable-tanned leashes, waxed-cotton coats, washable beds that hold up to a long life.

settings.heading: The Daily, in stock now.
settings.body: Twelve everyday goods, in four heirloom tones — designed once, restocked always.

settings.heading: We design for the way pets actually live.
settings.body:
Most pet goods are made for stores, not homes — bright, branded, and stacked on a shelf. We start the other way around: from a kitchen counter, a worn-in armchair, the linen sheet your dog has chosen as his own.

Every piece in The Daily is meant to be left out. To be folded into the rhythm of a household, not stowed in a closet between visits.

settings.heading: Built to live with you for a long time.

settings.title: OEKO-TEX® Linen
settings.body: Woven in Lithuania from European flax. Softens with every wash. Naturally hypoallergenic and machine-washable at home.

settings.title: Food-Grade Ceramic
settings.body: Wheel-thrown stoneware finished with a lead-free, FDA-approved glaze. Heavier on the floor; gentler on whiskers.

settings.title: Vegetable-Tanned Leather
settings.body: Full-grain hides tanned with chestnut bark in Tuscany. No chrome, no shortcuts. Patinas like a pair of well-loved boots.

settings.heading: Lived in.
settings.body: Real homes, real companions. Tag #livedinwithND for a chance to be featured.
